title: Office Space
excerpt: Today I am working from the offices of Two Peas In A Bucket in Middleton, WI. It's just slightly ironic because the day before I left, I received my most recent order. It's a great change of scenery and inspiring…
body:
Today I am working from the offices of Two Peas In A Bucket in Middleton, WI. It's just slightly ironic because the day before I left, I received my most recent order. 

It's a great change of scenery and inspiring to see the nuts and bolts of how a company like this works. I'm getting a behind-the-scenes peek all the busy people working hard at the office and warehouse. Grateful to have this mobile lifestyle. Surrounded by all the fun new product that just arrived is making me want to play with washi tape and pretty paper all day. Though the only thing I have created is this Wish List where you can see my favorite items. Would love to hear what you would do if you spent the day at a crafty office like this.
